directive: In src/tools/**/*.ts tool definition files, do not add zod.object() or .nullable() calls to tool schemas; represent complex inputs as short optional strings or flat primitive fields instead. Uses outside src/tools/**/*.ts are out of scope.
rationale: The repository keeps tool schemas simple for MCP consumers and has a local ESLint rule that rejects nullable fields and nested Zod objects in tool definition files.

source_evidence.excerpt: The Tools definitions block applies @local/enforce-zod-schema as an error for src/tools/**/*.ts.
The rule disallows .nullable() and zod.object() in tool schemas, recommending .optional() and short formatted strings for complex objects.
An existing nested object schema is explicitly marked with eslint-disable-next-line @local/enforce-zod-schema, showing that nested object schemas are exceptional rather than the default pattern.
